overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character canoeing through a river canyon. The journey begins facing a large waterfall in a basin, then turns into a narrow canyon with steep rocky walls, transitioning from calm waters to turbulent rapids.

events.description: canoe begins slow left turn away from the waterfall

agents.ego_description: floating in the canoe facing the waterfall, then beginning to paddle left to exit the basin

entered.detail: tall multi-tiered waterfall cascading down sheer cliff face with mist rising
steep rocky cliff with layered rock formations
tall rock wall rising vertically from the water
lush green deciduous trees along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a majestic waterfall cascading into a calm basin. The character floats in a canoe facing the falls, surrounded by steep rocky cliffs and lush green trees. Mist rises from the base of the waterfall as the canoe begins a slow turn to the left.

events.description: waterfall exits view as canoe enters narrow canyon passage
canoe completes turn and begins paddling straight downriver

agents.ego_description: turning the canoe away from the waterfall and entering the narrower canyon waterway

entered.detail: sunlit opening in the canyon showing distant landscape downstream

segments.scene_description: The canoe turns away from the waterfall and enters a narrower canyon passage. The high rocky walls close in on both sides as the character paddles steadily downstream. A distant sunlit valley becomes visible ahead as the waterfall disappears from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding river canyon with scattered cliff vegetation

events.description: water surface becomes slightly choppy as canoe approaches rocky section

agents.ego_description: paddling steadily through the calm canyon waters between high rock walls

entered.detail: scattered pine trees and shrubs growing on canyon slopes
large moss-covered rocks along the riverbank
small waterfall trickling down the cliff face

segments.scene_description: A long peaceful stretch through the canyon with the character maintaining a steady paddling rhythm. The canyon walls tower on both sides with scattered pine trees clinging to the slopes. Large boulders appear along the banks and a small cascade is visible on the left cliff.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river rapids section with turbulent water

events.description: water transitions to white water rapids with exposed rocks
canoe slows and maneuvers around rocks in the turbulent water

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating the canoe through turbulent rapids and around exposed rocks

entered.detail: exposed jagged rocks in the river creating rapids and obstacles
turbulent white water indicating fast current and shallow rocks

segments.scene_description: The final segment features challenging rapids as the water becomes turbulent and white. The character must navigate carefully around exposed rocks jutting from the water. The canyon walls remain steep and imposing as the journey continues through the rougher water section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene waterfall basin into a narrowing canyon that culminates in turbulent river rapids. It begins facing a majestic waterfall cascading into a calm basin, where mist rises around a canoe that slowly turns to the left. As the waterfall disappears from view, the camera follows the canoe into a narrower passage where high rocky walls close in and a distant sunlit valley emerges ahead. The scene then expands into a long, peaceful stretch of the canyon, passing towering slopes with clinging pine trees and boulders along the banks. Finally, the calm water shifts into white, turbulent rapids, forcing the canoe to navigate carefully around exposed rocks jutting from the river beneath the imposing cliffs.
